action.reasoning: Observation: FP+MLP (r2+r3 concat, 4096-dim) reached new best test AP=0.1742 (val AP=0.1922) after 80 epochs; loss converges to ~0.046, but no jsonl metrics (curves uninformative from old iters), train.py truncated at end, PyG still segfaults. Analysis: Model capacity and BN can be increased for better fit on imbalance (pos_weight+masking already good); full non-truncated code with DataLoader(bs=8192), per-epoch jsonl logging (loss/val_ap/lr), BN in MLP, higher capacity (hidden=1536/layers=5/dropout=0.05), longer training (120 epochs, patience=20) + grad_clip + lower init LR will push AP higher without OOM/NaNs. Caches ensure fast runs (~20min). Decision: Rewrite all files for consistency/enhancements, train fully, submit_eval on best.pt for improved avg_precision.
